title: Proteolytic Peptides from Conditioned Media Desalting  with C18 Hydrophilic–Lipophilic Balance (HLB) Cartridges
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dffjn","text":"Desalting of proteolytic peptides from conditioned media elution using C18 Hydrophilic–Lipophilic Balance (HLB) Cartridges in preparation for downstream proteomic profiling. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":72,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cfap2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bdk4l","text":"For desalting of proteolytic peptides from conditioned media Step 4 is modified as we typically reconstitute in an appropriate volume of 0.2% FA rather than by weight/volume due to the input material for digestion also being based on a proportion of the volume of concentrated conditioned media. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"4plrq","text":"Oasis HLB 1cc cartridges, 10 mg sorbent (Waters, Cat. #WAT058882)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c6t0q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fd7nd","text":"Vacuum manifold","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8iv3j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"biic","text":"Centrifuge
","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5a4d5","text":"Centrifugal vacuum concentrator
","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e9akf","text":"1.5-mL microcentrifuge tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"69i35","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"db3jc","text":"Condition buffer/Elution buffer: 50% acetonitrile (ACN), 0.2% formic acid (FA) in water
","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"etr61","text":"Equilibration buffer/Wash buffer: 0.2% formic acid (FA) in water
","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"u2v2","text":"HPLC-grade water","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Centrifuge the samples at 1,850 x g for 5 minutes at room temperature to pellet insoluble material.
Desalt the samples using Oasis HLB solid-phase extraction cartridges placed on top of a vacuum manifold as follows:
Condition each cartridge two times with 800 µL of the condition buffer (50% ACN, 0.2% FA).
Equilibrate each cartridge three times with 800 µL of the equilibration buffer (0.2% FA).
Wash each cartridge three times with 800 µL of the wash buffer (0.2% FA).
Elute peptides with 800 µL of the elution buffer (50% ACN, 0.2% FA) followed by a further 400 µL of the same elution buffer.
Vacuum dry the eluted peptide solution in a centrifugal vacuum concentrator.
Reconstitute the dried peptides in an appropriate volume of 0.2% FA and thoroughly mix the solution.
Centrifuge at 12,000 x g at room temperature for 2 min, and store at -20°C.
creator: M A Watson
